S.AlwaysOnTop: Always on top (keep window in front)

S.IconPicker.Title: Choose group icon
S.Tip.Parent: Pick a parent task and the new task becomes its subtask
S.Input.Placeholder: Add a new task, press Enter…
S.Sort.Title: By title
S.Import.NoTasks: No task lines recognized (check the Markdown format)
S.Voice.HelpBody:
Could not start system voice input. Enable it or invoke it manually:

1. Make sure you are on Windows 10 (version 1809 or later) or Windows 11.
2. Open Settings → Privacy & security → Speech (or Time & language → Speech), turn on Online speech recognition, and allow microphone access under Accessibility → Speech.
3. Put the cursor in the input box below and press Win + H to open the voice typing bar, then speak into your microphone.
   First use may require downloading speech components online and granting microphone permission.
S.Settings.Title: Settings
S.Settings.NoteFontDesc: Font, size and line spacing for note text (independent from the task area; affects the note editor only)
S.About.SupportDesc: This is a free little tool I build in my spare time. If it helps you, please give the project a ⭐ Star on GitHub — it's the best encouragement for the author and helps more people discover it.
S.Settings.HolidaysDesc: Mark Chinese public holidays on the calendar and highlight days off (fetched online; first run needs a connection)
S.Settings.RestoreDefaultsDesc: Restore appearance, toggles, layout sizes and to-do/note typography to defaults (your language and your notes, groups and tasks are untouched)
S.Settings.AutoStartDesc: Launch automatically when you sign in to Windows (current user)
S.Settings.EffectsDesc: Play a fireworks animation when a task is completed
S.Settings.SoundDesc: Play an upbeat celebration tune when a task is completed
S.Settings.ReminderSoundDesc: Play a soft chime when a recurring reminder fires (off = bottom-left notification only)
S.Settings.SoundStyle.Title: Sound style
S.Settings.SoundStyle.Desc: Completion and reminder sounds follow one style (matched timbre); tap preview to pick
S.Settings.FontDesc: Adjust the font, size and line spacing of task & body text (icons and chrome are unaffected)
S.Settings.AutoUpdateDesc: Check GitHub for a new version at startup and hourly (turn off to stop auto-checking)
S.Settings.CheckUpdateDesc: Check now whether a newer version is available
S.Settings.ManualDownloadDesc: Open the latest release page in your browser to manually download and install the latest exe
S.Settings.ManualDownloadHint: The latest release page is now open in your browser. Please download and run the latest exe.
S.Settings.ReinstallDesc: Re-download and install the current version (repairs a broken or sluggish install)
S.Settings.ManualDownloadDesc: Open the releases page in your browser to download the latest version manually (fallback if in-app update fails)
S.Update.Title: Update available
S.Update.NoAsset: No installable package is available for this version.
S.Update.UpToDate: You are on the latest version.
S.Update.CheckFailed: Update check failed, please try again later.
S.Update.DownloadFailed: Download failed, please try again later.
S.Update.LaunchFailed.Title: Couldn't start the new version
S.Update.LaunchFailed.Message: The new version was downloaded but couldn't start automatically. Please run it manually from the location below:
S.Help.Title: Help
S.Help.Tasks.Title: Tasks
S.Help.Tasks.L1: Type in the bottom-right box and press Enter or click "Add" to create a task.
S.Help.Tasks.L2: After typing, a panel with priority, due time and the "Reminder" toggle pops up above.
S.Help.Tasks.L3: Pick a quick time (in 5 min … in 1 week) or use "Custom" down to the minute.
S.Help.Tasks.L4: Click a task title to edit it; right-click a task to edit, clear the due date, complete or delete it.
S.Help.Tasks.L5: Completed tasks move into the "Done" group automatically; unchecking restores them.
S.Help.Tasks.L6: Drag tasks to reorder; long titles show only the beginning.
S.Help.Tasks.L7: Right-click a task and choose "Pin / Unpin to top": a pinned top-level task keeps its whole family at the very top, regardless of the sort order.
S.Help.Tasks.L8: When setting a due time or recurring reminder, just pick the date/time or enter a value and it applies instantly — no "Set" button needed; the "Clear" button on each undoes it anytime.
S.Help.Subtasks.Title: Subtasks & indenting
S.Help.Subtasks.L1: Select a task and press Tab to indent it into a subtask of the one above; Shift+Tab promotes it.
S.Help.Subtasks.L2: The right-click menu also offers "Make subtask / Promote", up to 6 nesting levels.
S.Help.Subtasks.L3: Indent levels are preserved through Markdown import/export (expressed as list nesting).
S.Help.Schedule.Title: Schedule / calendar
S.Help.Schedule.L1: Click the calendar button at the top-right of the content header to open or close the embedded schedule panel on the right.
S.Help.Schedule.L2: Switch Day / Week / Month. Day and Week show a 0–24 hour axis on the left and place tasks by their due time — all 24 hours fit in one screen.
S.Help.Schedule.L3: Click a task block in the calendar to view and edit it; drag the middle divider to resize the to-do list and the calendar.
S.Help.Schedule.L4: With the calendar open, dragging the window edge resizes only the calendar — the to-do list keeps its width, and is resized only via the middle divider.
S.Help.Voice.Title: Voice input
S.Help.Voice.L1: The microphone button next to the new-task box triggers Windows dictation (same as Win+H).
S.Help.Voice.L2: First use requires enabling voice typing under Settings → Time & language → Speech.
S.Help.Reminder.Title: Recurring reminders
S.Help.Reminder.L1: When creating a task, tick "Reminder" and set an interval (30 min by default).
S.Help.Reminder.L2: When it fires, a bottom-left notification appears and, if "Reminder sound" is on, a soft chime plays.
S.Help.Reminder.L3: Reminders stop once a task is completed; right-click a task to toggle the switch anytime.
S.Help.IO.Title: Import / Export Markdown
S.Help.IO.L1: "Import / Export" in the sidebar exports the current list to .md, or imports tasks from a .md file.
S.Help.IO.L2: The format is editor-friendly: groups use ## headings, each task line is - [ ] / - [x].
S.Help.IO.L3: Subtask indents are written as two spaces per level and restored on import.
S.Help.Dock.Title: Edge auto-hide
S.Help.Dock.L1: Drag the window to the top / left / right screen edge and it slides out and hides.
S.Help.Dock.L2: Move the mouse to that screen edge to slide it back; it hides again once you move away.
S.Help.Dock.L3: Drag the title bar again to undock and return to a normal window.
S.Help.Group.Title: Groups
S.Help.Group.L1: The left sidebar is the group bar: click "All Tasks" to see everything, or a group name to switch.
S.Help.Group.L2: "New Group" adds a custom group; drag groups to reorder them.
S.Help.Group.L3: Right-click a group to change color / clear / delete it ("Done" cannot be deleted).
S.Help.Group.L4: Drag to resize the sidebar; "Collapse" folds it into a narrow icon rail, click again to expand.
S.Help.Theme.Title: Themes & settings
S.Help.Theme.L1: "Theme" switches built-in themes (incl. transparent, glass) or creates a custom theme.
S.Help.Theme.L2: The top-right menu → "Settings" toggles run-at-startup, completion effect, completion sound and reminder sound.
S.Help.Theme.L3: Click the sort button to the right of the title to choose a sort order.
S.Help.Theme.L4: "Settings" lets you adjust the font, size and line spacing of task & body text; changes apply instantly and are saved automatically.
S.Help.Theme.L5: The theme picker is a separate, draggable, resizable window beside the app; ~90 palettes are grouped by style (Classic / Morandi / Macaron / Dunhuang / Mondrian / Memphis / Rococo / Matisse / Transparent), with a group bar to jump to any group.
S.Help.Theme.L6: Right-click any theme to add or remove it from Favorites; the Favorites group sits first and can be drag-reordered; when empty it shows a right-click hint.
S.Help.Theme.L7: Create / edit custom themes with the built-in HSV color picker; the whole UI (including the calendar) previews live while editing, and reverts to your previous theme if you close without saving. Right-click a custom theme to edit or delete it.
S.Help.Window.Title: Window
S.Help.Window.L1: Top-right red / yellow / green: close to tray / minimize / maximize-restore.
S.Help.Window.L2: Closing only hides to the system tray; double-click the tray icon to restore, right-click to quit.
S.Help.Window.L3: The pin button to the left of the menu button keeps the window always on top.
S.Help.Window.L4: When you choose "Show" from the tray while the window is hidden against a screen edge, it un-docks and re-centers automatically.
S.Help.Update.Title: Auto-update / About
S.Help.Update.L1: On startup and periodically afterward, the app checks GitHub for a newer version and prompts you; one click downloads it and restarts into the new version (self-contained single file, no runtime install needed).
S.Help.Update.L2: You can choose "Skip this version" in the prompt, or turn off automatic update checks in Settings.
S.Help.Update.L3: Top-right menu → "About" shows the current version and lets you manually check / download the latest build.
S.Help.Contact.Title: Contact the developer
S.ThemeEditor.Title: Custom theme
S.ThemeFav.Empty: No favorites yet — right-click any theme to add it here.
S.ThemeEditor.Name: Theme name
S.ThemeEditor.BaseOn: Based on an existing theme (auto-fills the rest)

S.Schedule.Title: Schedule
S.Schedule.Tooltip: View todos on a calendar by due date
S.Schedule.NoTasks: No due-dated todos in this period
S.Schedule.DragToSetTime: Drag a to-do from the left onto a time to set its due time
S.Schedule.DragHint.Title: Tip: drag to set a due time
S.Schedule.DragHint.Body:
You can drag a to-do from the left onto the calendar to set its due time:
· Day / Week view: drop on an hour to set that exact hour
· Month view: drop on a day to set it to 18:00

(This tip is shown only once)
S.Note.DeleteConfirm: Delete this note? This cannot be undone.
S.Note.Heading: Heading (cycles H1→H2→H3)
S.Note.GroupDeleteConfirm: Delete this group? Its notes will move back to the inbox root and won't be deleted.
S.Settings.PriorityBlockDesc: When on, the checkbox ring shows no priority color; a red/yellow/green block in front of each task indicates priority instead.
S.Settings.QuadrantImportantDesc: By default both "High" and "Medium" count as important; turn off to treat only "High" as important.
S.Settings.QuadrantUrgent: Matrix: count "due within 3 days" as urgent
S.Settings.QuadrantUrgentDesc: By default only "overdue or due today" is urgent; turn on to also treat "due within 3 days" as urgent.
